title: gongylocarpus fruticulosus
intro: Gongylocarpus fruticulosus is a type of plant commonly known as the shrubby gongylanthus or shrubby gongylanthus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Gongylocarpus fruticulosus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
